title: Irons Spells & Spellbooks + Ice & Fire
description:
Iron's Spells and Spellbooks x Ice and Fire.

This datapack will add loot from Irons Spells & Spellbooks into chests from Ice & Fire.
body:
This datapack adds an compatibility between Iron Spells & Spellbooks and Ice & Fire.
- This way Iron's Spells & Spellbooks loot can be found in Ice & Fire chests.
- The datapack will need to be added to your world after you created it, otherwise it will not work.
- Please note that Ice & Fire loot gets partly replaced.

Chests are affected with different loot types:
- The only chest types from Ice & Fire that are not changed are the cyclops cave chests and the myrmex trash chests.
- Chests like graveyard and mauloseums have normal loot.
- Chests in dragon roots gets better loot.
- Chests in dragon caves gets the best loot possible.
- Note that the spell scrolls rarities are not specified by the type of loot. For example the dragon cave chest can have a normal spellbook while the graveyard has a rare type.
